root_text.sn45.15:1.2: “Aṭṭhime, bhikkhave, dhammā bhāvitā bahulīkatā anuppannā uppajjanti, nāññatra sugatavinayā.
root_text.sn45.15:1.5: Ime kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭha dhammā bhāvitā bahulīkatā anuppannā uppajjanti, nāññatra sugatavinayā”ti.

translation_text.sn45.15:1.2: “Mendicants, these eight things don’t arise to be developed and cultivated apart from the Holy One’s training.
translation_text.sn45.15:1.4: They are: right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.sn45.15:1.5: These are the eight things that don’t arise to be developed and cultivated apart from the Holy One’s training.”
